title: Tighten pion GFF dispersive bounds with explicit positivity kernels
summary: Recast pion GFF constraints into an optimization problem with explicit positivity kernels and scan subtraction/normalization assumptions. Goal: produce a numerically reproducible bound stronger/different than seed literature without coupled channels.

expected_artifacts.description: Step-by-step derivation of the bound and assumptions (NOT_FOR_CITATION).

verification_plan: Implement a deterministic script that (i) reproduces a baseline bound from seed paper under identical assumptions and (ii) demonstrates a tightened bound when adding the new positivity constraint. Save all inputs/outputs/plots with hashes.
risks: Constraint set may be too weak without additional external inputs; mitigate by proving a clean analytic inequality first.
Numerical optimization instability; mitigate with toy problems + regression tests.
